subcodes.first_line: O thou Zoroastrian who art celestial and Bahá'í who art illumined! That which thou didst write was perused, and all [3.5s]... ...Thou hadst written that in the sacred books of the followers of Zoroaster it is written
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای زردشتی بهشتی و بهائی سنائی آنچه مرقوم نموده بودی ملاحظه گردید جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @education of children; moral education, @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations
